ItacPersonItem.Notes: Pico features in Vincenzo de Conti, Notizie Storiche della Citta` di Casale del Monferrato (1840), vol. 7, in which he is described as a `gentiluomo di Casale` and a `provveditore`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
